title: Smoky Pork Baozi
description: A delicious and authentic Chinese dish featuring tender pork and smoky flavors wrapped in soft baozi.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the shredded pork, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch. Mix well.
Cut the baozi dough into small pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the pork mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges with sesame oil and fold the dough over to form a bun.
Place the baozi on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with sesame oil and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm with chopped scallions and a drizzle of soy sauce.
